production_position: Content Engine OMEGA is a governed content, monetization, marketing psychology, learning, decision, optimization, and controlled autonomy system.
hud_identity: Intelligent operational HUD, not dashboard, not static mockup, not simple panel UI.

hud_levels.name: System Consciousness / Estado vivo
hud_levels.purpose: Show system health, safe mode, repo, continuity, current phase, risks, sync state, and active blocks.
hud_levels.answers: Is Content Engine healthy, synchronized, controlled, and safe?

hud_levels.name: Strategic & Monetization Brain
hud_levels.purpose: Show channels, business domains, monetization paths, offers, conversion strategy, launch priority, and revenue alignment.
hud_levels.answers: Are we creating content aligned with real money generation?

hud_levels.name: Content Production Pipeline
hud_levels.purpose: Show ideas, scripts, metadata, audio, video, publication, status, validation, blockers, and next pipeline actions.
hud_levels.answers: Where is each content item in the production lifecycle?
hud_levels.must_not_be: A static task board without state intelligence.

hud_levels.name: Psychological Marketing & Creative Intelligence
hud_levels.purpose: Show audience, pain, desire, fear, trigger, hook, language, tone, narrative, CTA, and ethical conversion limits.
hud_levels.answers: Does this content connect, convert, and remain honest/ethical?

hud_levels.name: Controlled Autonomy, Security & Authorization
hud_levels.purpose: Show suggested actions, allowed actions, blocked actions, safe mode, risk, confidence, autonomy level, and human authorization gates.
hud_levels.answers: What can the system do, what is blocked, and what must Romel approve?

hud_levels.name: Evidence, Metrics, Decisions & Learning
hud_levels.purpose: Show metrics, performance, decisions, optimization, learning, manifests, seals, reports, hashes, commits, errors, and evidence.
hud_levels.answers: What evidence supports each decision and learning?

hud_levels.name: Executive Command & Next Movement
hud_levels.purpose: Show next safe step, recommended action, alternatives, risk, expected impact, pending decisions, and closure.
hud_levels.answers: What should Romel do next, and why?

capabilities.name: System identity and monetizable content objective
capabilities.production_meaning: Content Engine OMEGA is a governed digital system for content creation, measurement, optimization, learning, and monetization.

capabilities.production_meaning: The system must validate, register evidence, protect integrity, fail closed, and avoid silent or unsafe execution.

capabilities.name: Repo, continuity, synchronization, and state control
capabilities.production_meaning: Local PC, local Git, remote Git, and continuity must remain synchronized and auditable before and after operations.

capabilities.name: Full content pipeline lifecycle
capabilities.production_meaning: The system must move content through idea, script, metadata, audio, video, publication, metrics, decision, optimization, and learning.

capabilities.name: Idea, script, and metadata generation engines
capabilities.production_meaning: Content Engine must create and validate ideas, scripts, titles, descriptions, tags, prompts, and metadata under channel strategy.

capabilities.name: Audio, video, and publication engines
capabilities.production_meaning: Content Engine must govern audio/video generation and publication as controlled pipeline phases, distinguishing mock/manual/real states.

capabilities.name: Multichannel strategy A/B/C/D
capabilities.production_meaning: The system must organize channels by role: money/conversion, curiosities/traffic, motivation/retention, AI-tech-personal/authority.

capabilities.name: Monetization and revenue generation systems

capabilities.name: Decision engine
capabilities.production_meaning: The system must classify results, record decisions, recommend actions with reasons, and block decisions without evidence.

capabilities.name: Optimization engine
capabilities.production_meaning: The system must transform decisions into controlled optimization actions, variations, improvements, observations, blocks, or review requests.
